title: Mustardy Tender American Mushrooms Robata-Grill
description: A paleo-friendly, Mustardy tender American dish featuring mushrooms, Robata-grill. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: sea salt or Himalayan pink salt

instructions: Preheat the Robata-grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the stems from the Portobello mushrooms and slice the caps into 1-inch thick pieces.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Dijon mustard, chopped garlic, and chopped thyme.
Brush the mushrooms with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the mushrooms for 2-3 minutes per side, or until tender and slightly charred.
Transfer the mushrooms to a plate and brush with the balsamic vinegar mixture.
Drizzle the ghee over the mushrooms and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
